# neon_connection_uri (Data Source)

Retrieves a connection URI for a Neon database.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_connection_uri" "example" {
  project_id    = "your-project-id"
  database_name = "neondb"
  role_name     = "neondb_owner"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `database_name` (String) The database name.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.
- `role_name` (String) The role name.

### Optional

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID. Defaults to the project's default branch if not specified.
- `endpoint_id` (String) The endpoint ID. Defaults to the read-write endpoint associated with the branch if not specified.
- `pooled` (Boolean) Whether to use a pooled connection URI.

### Read-Only

- `uri` (String, Sensitive) The connection URI.
